params.yesSide: True to buy YES shares, false for NO.

claim().details: Winners receive pro-rata share of the total pool (minus already-extracted fees).

dispute().details: Anyone can call. Transitions to DISPUTED, enabling pro-rata refunds for all participants.

params._initialReserve: Initial reserve per side (USDC must already be transferred).
params._keywordB: Hash of keyword B (zero for DIRECTION).
params._threshold: Value threshold for DIRECTION markets (zero for H2H).

paused().details: Returns true if the contract is paused, and false otherwise.

params.yesSide: True to sell YES shares, false for NO.

params.valueA: Attention metric value for keyword A.
params.valueB: Attention metric value for keyword B (zero for DIRECTION markets).

buy(bool,uint256,uint256).notice: Buy YES or NO shares using USDC.

dispute().notice: Dispute the market if oracle fails to submit settlement within deadline + grace period.

emergencyPause().notice: Pause trading (buy/sell). Does not affect claim or dispute.

getState().notice: Get current market state as a single enum value.

getUserPosition(address).notice: Get the user's position in this market.

initialize(uint256,uint8,uint8,bytes32,b.notice: Initialize the market (called once by factory via clone).

requestSettlement().notice: Request settlement after trading window closes. Anyone can call.

sell(bool,uint256,uint256).notice: Sell YES or NO shares back for USDC.

submitSettlement(uint256,uint256,bytes).notice: Oracle submits settlement values with a signed attestation.
